title: Can i create item via Spring GraphQL?
excerpt:
Can i create item via Spring GraphQL? 
If can then please guide how to set schema and mutation query.

Hi @thlee,

While we don’t have documentation specifically related to Spring, we do have API documentation that can help you get started on making requests to the monday GraphQL API.

I hope this helps!
